---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Cooper Joseph Sharp"
date: "2026-03-26"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}

# ============================================================================
# ICRG: Healthy Control vs. Recreational Gamblers — Paper Analysis
# Author: Cooper Joseph Sharp
# Date:   2026-03-26
# ============================================================================

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(car)
library(broom)
library(pscl)
library(lmtest)
library(sandwich)
library(tidycensus)
library(pROC)
library(knitr)

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 1. DATA LOADING & PREPARATION
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

setwd("~/Documents/GitHub/2025-ICRG")
df     <- read.csv("derivatives/scoring/analytic-sample.csv")

# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 2. ANALYTIC SAMPLE — HC (0) vs. Recreational (1)
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

dat <- df %>%
  filter(pg != 2) %>%
  drop_na(
    pg, demo_gender, income_median_split,
    TotalCrime, unemployed, gini, demo_yrs,
    rew_composite,
    dospert_gam, dospert_soc, dospert_inv,
    dospert_hs, dospert_ethic, dospert_rec,
    susd_depression, susd_mania, scared_total,
    uclal_total, bisbas_bas, bisbas_bis, sas_total, planfulness_mean
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    PG     = ifelse(pg == 1, 1L, 0L),      # 0 = HC, 1 = recreational
    gender = factor(demo_gender),
    income = factor(income_median_split),

    z_age           = as.numeric(scale(demo_yrs)),
    z_yoe           = as.numeric(scale(ses_yoe)),
    z_fevs          = as.numeric(scale(fevs_total)),
    z_usidep        = as.numeric(scale(usidep_total)),

    z_reward        = as.numeric(scale(rew_composite)),
    z_dospert_inv   = as.numeric(scale(dospert_inv)),
    z_dospert_ethic = as.numeric(scale(dospert_ethic)),
    z_dospert_soc   = as.numeric(scale(dospert_soc)),
    z_dospert_hs    = as.numeric(scale(dospert_hs)),
    z_dospert_rec   = as.numeric(scale(dospert_rec)),

    z_depression    = as.numeric(scale(susd_depression)),
    z_mania         = as.numeric(scale(susd_mania)),
    z_anxiety       = as.numeric(scale(scared_total)),
    z_loneliness    = as.numeric(scale(uclal_total)),
    z_planfulness   = as.numeric(scale(planfulness_mean)),

    z_neigh_disadv = rowMeans(cbind(
      as.numeric(scale(TotalCrime)),
      as.numeric(scale(unemployed)),
      as.numeric(scale(gini))
    ), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  filter(gender %in% c(1, 2))

cat("Analytic N =", nrow(dat), "\n")
cat("HC (PG=0):",          sum(dat$PG == 0), "\n")
cat("Recreational (PG=1):", sum(dat$PG == 1), "\n")
table(dat$race, dat$PG)


# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 3. HIERARCHICAL LOGISTIC REGRESSION
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# Block 1: Demographics + neighbourhood context
m1 <- glm(
  PG ~ z_neigh_disadv + gender + z_age + race + z_yoe,
  data = dat, family = binomial
)

# Block 2: + Reward sensitivity & risk-taking
m2 <- glm(
  PG ~ z_neigh_disadv + gender + z_age + race + z_yoe +
    z_reward + z_dospert_hs + z_dospert_soc + z_dospert_ethic +
    z_dospert_inv + z_dospert_rec,
  data = dat, family = binomial
)

# Block 3: + Clinical/social symptoms
m3 <- glm(
  PG ~ z_neigh_disadv + gender + z_age + race + z_yoe +
    z_reward + z_dospert_hs + z_dospert_soc + z_dospert_ethic +
    z_dospert_inv + z_dospert_rec +
    z_depression + z_mania + z_anxiety + z_loneliness +
    z_planfulness,
  data = dat, family = binomial
)

# Block 4: + Financial vulnerability
m4 <- glm(
  PG ~ z_neigh_disadv + gender + z_age + income + race + z_yoe +
    z_reward + z_dospert_hs + z_dospert_soc + z_dospert_ethic +
    z_dospert_inv + z_dospert_rec +
    z_depression + z_mania + z_anxiety + z_loneliness +
    z_planfulness +
    z_fevs + z_usidep,
  data = dat, family = binomial
)


# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 4. MODEL COMPARISONS
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

cat("\n── Likelihood-ratio tests ──\n")
anova(m1, m2, test = "Chisq")
anova(m2, m3, test = "Chisq")
anova(m3, m4, test = "Chisq")

data.frame(
  Model       = c("M1: Context", "M2: + Reward/Risk",
                   "M3: + Clinical", "M4: + Financial"),
  AIC         = round(AIC(m1, m2, m3, m4)$AIC, 1),
  BIC         = round(BIC(m1, m2, m3, m4)$BIC, 1),
  McFadden_R2 = round(c(pR2(m1)["McFadden"], pR2(m2)["McFadden"],
                         pR2(m3)["McFadden"], pR2(m4)["McFadden"]), 3)
) %>% kable()

cat("\n── VIF (M4) ──\n")
vif(m4)

cat("\n── HC3 Robust SEs (M4) ──\n")
coeftest(m4, vcov = vcovHC(m4, type = "HC3"))


# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 5. ODDS RATIOS
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

col_pg <- "purple4"

get_or_table <- function(model) {
  est <- coef(model)
  ci  <- suppressMessages(confint(model))
  data.frame(
    term    = names(est),
    OR      = exp(est),
    CI_low  = exp(ci[, 1]),
    CI_high = exp(ci[, 2]),
    row.names = NULL
  )
}

or_m4 <- get_or_table(m4)

tidy(m4, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(across(c(estimate, conf.low, conf.high), ~ round(., 3)),
         p.value = round(p.value, 3),
         sig = case_when(
           p.value < .001 ~ "***",
           p.value < .01  ~ "**",
           p.value < .05  ~ "*",
           p.value < .1   ~ ".",
           TRUE           ~ ""
         )) %>%
  rename(OR = estimate, CI_low = conf.low, CI_high = conf.high) %>%
  kable()

or_m4 %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
  mutate(term = reorder(term, OR)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(OR, term)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = CI_low, xmax = CI_high), height = 0.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3, colour = col_pg) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(x = "Odds Ratio (log scale)", y = NULL,
       title = "Odds Ratios — HC vs. Recreational Gamblers (M4)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)


# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 6. ROC / AUC
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

col_ng <- "pink3"
col_rg <- "purple1"

roc1 <- roc(dat$PG, predict(m1, type = "response"), quiet = TRUE)
roc2 <- roc(dat$PG, predict(m2, type = "response"), quiet = TRUE)
roc3 <- roc(dat$PG, predict(m3, type = "response"), quiet = TRUE)
roc4 <- roc(dat$PG, predict(m4, type = "response"), quiet = TRUE)

auc_table <- data.frame(
  Model = c("M1: Context", "M2: + Reward/Risk",
            "M3: + Clinical", "M4: + Financial"),
  AUC   = round(c(auc(roc1), auc(roc2), auc(roc3), auc(roc4)), 3)
)
kable(auc_table)

cat("\n── DeLong Tests ──\n")
cat("M1 vs M2:\n"); print(roc.test(roc1, roc2, method = "delong"))
cat("M2 vs M3:\n"); print(roc.test(roc2, roc3, method = "delong"))
cat("M3 vs M4:\n"); print(roc.test(roc3, roc4, method = "delong"))

ggroc(
  list(
    "M1: Context"       = roc1,
    "M2: + Reward/Risk" = roc2,
    "M3: + Clinical"    = roc3,
    "M4: + Financial"   = roc4
  ),
  linewidth = 1
) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 1, slope = 1,
              linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey60") +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("M1: Context"       = "grey70",
               "M2: + Reward/Risk" = col_ng,
               "M3: + Clinical"    = col_rg,
               "M4: + Financial"   = col_pg)
  ) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.25, y = 0.30, hjust = 0, size = 3.8,
           label = paste0(
             "AUC M1 = ", auc_table$AUC[1], "\n",
             "AUC M2 = ", auc_table$AUC[2], "\n",
             "AUC M3 = ", auc_table$AUC[3], "\n",
             "AUC M4 = ", auc_table$AUC[4]
           )) +
  labs(x = "Specificity", y = "Sensitivity", colour = "Model",
       title = "ROC Curves: HC vs. Recreational Gamblers") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

# ── Classification at Youden's J ────────────────────────────────────────────
best_thresh <- coords(roc4, "best",
                      ret = c("threshold", "sensitivity",
                              "specificity", "ppv", "npv"))
cat("\n── Optimal Cut-Point (Youden's J) ──\n")
print(best_thresh)

predicted_class <- ifelse(predict(m4, type = "response") > best_thresh$threshold, 1, 0)
cat("\n── Confusion Matrix ──\n")
table(Predicted = predicted_class, Actual = dat$PG)
cat("Accuracy:", round(mean(predicted_class == dat$PG, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")


# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# 7. CROSS-VALIDATION & LASSO
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

library(boot)
library(glmnet)

set.seed(42)
K <- 10
folds <- sample(rep(1:K, length.out = nrow(dat)))

cv_auc <- function(formula, data, folds, K) {
  held_out_probs <- numeric(nrow(data))
  for (k in 1:K) {
    train <- data[folds != k, ]
    test  <- data[folds == k, ]
    fit   <- glm(formula, data = train, family = binomial)
    held_out_probs[folds == k] <- predict(fit, newdata = test, type = "response")
  }
  return(auc(roc(data$PG, held_out_probs, quiet = TRUE)))
}

cv_auc_m1 <- cv_auc(
  PG ~ z_neigh_disadv + gender + z_age + race + z_yoe,
  dat, folds, K)
cv_auc_m2 <- cv_auc(
  PG ~ z_neigh_disadv + gender + z_age + race + z_yoe +
    z_reward + z_dospert_hs + z_dospert_soc + z_dospert_ethic +
    z_dospert_inv + z_dospert_rec,
  dat, folds, K)
cv_auc_m3 <- cv_auc(
  PG ~ z_neigh_disadv + gender + z_age + race + z_yoe +
    z_reward + z_dospert_hs + z_dospert_soc + z_dospert_ethic +
    z_dospert_inv + z_dospert_rec +
    z_depression + z_mania + z_anxiety + z_loneliness +
    z_planfulness,
  dat, folds, K)
cv_auc_m4 <- cv_auc(
  PG ~ z_neigh_disadv + gender + z_age + income + race + z_yoe +
    z_reward + z_dospert_hs + z_dospert_soc + z_dospert_ethic +
    z_dospert_inv + z_dospert_rec +
    z_depression + z_mania + z_anxiety + z_loneliness +
    z_planfulness +
    z_fevs + z_usidep,
  dat, folds, K)

comparison <- data.frame(
  Model        = c("M1: Context", "M2: + Reward/Risk",
                    "M3: + Clinical", "M4: + Financial"),
  InSample_AUC = round(c(auc(roc1), auc(roc2), auc(roc3), auc(roc4)), 3),
  CV_AUC       = round(c(cv_auc_m1, cv_auc_m2, cv_auc_m3, cv_auc_m4), 3)
)
comparison$Shrinkage <- comparison$InSample_AUC - comparison$CV_AUC
kable(comparison)

# ── Repeated CV (M3 and M4 only) ────────────────────────────────────────────
n_repeats <- 50

repeated_cv_auc <- function(formula, data, K, n_repeats) {
  aucs <- numeric(n_repeats)
  for (r in 1:n_repeats) {
    folds_r <- sample(rep(1:K, length.out = nrow(data)))
    aucs[r] <- cv_auc(formula, data, folds_r, K)
  }
  return(aucs)
}

cat("\n── Running 50 × 10-fold CV ──\n")

rep_m3 <- repeated_cv_auc(
  PG ~ z_neigh_disadv + gender + z_age + race + z_yoe +
    z_reward + z_dospert_hs + z_dospert_soc + z_dospert_ethic +
    z_dospert_inv + z_dospert_rec +
    z_depression + z_mania + z_anxiety + z_loneliness +
    z_planfulness,
  dat, K, n_repeats)

rep_m4 <- repeated_cv_auc(
  PG ~ z_neigh_disadv + gender + z_age + income + race + z_yoe +
    z_reward + z_dospert_hs + z_dospert_soc + z_dospert_ethic +
    z_dospert_inv + z_dospert_rec +
    z_depression + z_mania + z_anxiety + z_loneliness +
    z_planfulness +
    z_fevs + z_usidep,
  dat, K, n_repeats)

cat(sprintf("  M3 repeated CV: %.3f [%.3f, %.3f]\n",
    mean(rep_m3), quantile(rep_m3, 0.025), quantile(rep_m3, 0.975)))
cat(sprintf("  M4 repeated CV: %.3f [%.3f, %.3f]\n",
    mean(rep_m4), quantile(rep_m4, 0.025), quantile(rep_m4, 0.975)))

# ── LASSO ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
x_vars <- model.matrix(
  ~ z_neigh_disadv + gender + z_age + income + race + z_yoe +
    z_reward + z_dospert_hs + z_dospert_soc + z_dospert_ethic +
    z_dospert_inv + z_dospert_rec +
    z_depression + z_mania + z_anxiety + z_loneliness +
    z_planfulness + z_fevs + z_usidep,
  data = dat
)[, -1]

y <- dat$PG

set.seed(42)
lasso_cv_auc <- cv.glmnet(x_vars, y, family = "binomial",
                           alpha = 1, nfolds = 10, type.measure = "auc")

lasso_coefs <- coef(lasso_cv_auc, s = "lambda.1se")
retained <- data.frame(
  term = rownames(lasso_coefs),
  coef = round(as.numeric(lasso_coefs), 4)
) %>%
  filter(coef != 0, term != "(Intercept)")

cat("\n── LASSO Retained Predictors ──\n")
kable(retained)

best_idx <- which(lasso_cv_auc$lambda == lasso_cv_auc$lambda.min)
cat(sprintf("\n── LASSO CV AUC: %.3f ──\n", lasso_cv_auc$cvm[best_idx]))

# ── Summary ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\n═══════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("  OVERFITTING DIAGNOSTIC SUMMARY\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat(sprintf("  M4 in-sample AUC:    %.3f\n", auc(roc4)))
cat(sprintf("  M4 10-fold CV AUC:   %.3f\n", cv_auc_m4))
cat(sprintf("  M4 repeated CV:      %.3f [%.3f, %.3f]\n",
    mean(rep_m4), quantile(rep_m4, 0.025), quantile(rep_m4, 0.975)))
cat(sprintf("  LASSO CV AUC:        %.3f\n", lasso_cv_auc$cvm[best_idx]))
cat(sprintf("  Predictors retained: %d / %d\n", nrow(retained), ncol(x_vars)))
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")

```
